properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You're the Lord You Changeth not You're the Lord You Changeth not

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You will never, ever Change You're the Lord You Remain The Same

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jehovah is your name Jehovah is your name Jehovah is your name Jehovah is your name

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Mighty warrior Great in battle Jehovah is your name

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Jesus is your name Jesus is your name Jesus is your name Jesus is your name

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Mighty warrior Great in battle Jesus is your name
